metadata.name: Verify a Claim Payment was Sent

description: A life insurance beneficiary is calling to check if their claim payment has been mailed.

nodes.task_description: Identify the beneficiary and the associated claim.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the correct claim file.

nodes.task_description: Check the payment system for the status of the claim check.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the check was printed and mailed two days ago.

nodes.task_description: Inform the beneficiary that the check has been sent and provide the check number and mailing date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear update and supporting details to the beneficiary.
